message:
test(pt-bundle): Improve deterministic ordering test

Enhanced test_deterministic_output to verify:
- Both outputs are valid ZIPs (PK header check)
- File order in manifest is sorted alphabetically
- Checksums match for identical content

Previously only compared byte lengths which could miss ordering issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
